name: claude-chat
description: Chat application powered by Claude via the Anthropic API

scripts.copy:assets: cp src/client/index.html dist/public/ && cp src/client/style.css dist/public/
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/public && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:client && pnpm run copy:assets
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/public && pnpm run copy:assets && concurrently "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:client"
